requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC builds and uses a full conversation compaction prompt with a no-tool preamble, detailed continuation-summary structure, optional custom instructions, and a no-tool reminder trailer.
edgeCases: custom instructions are appended only when non-empty
the prompt starts with the no-tool text-only framing
the prompt ends with the no-tool reminder
live compact provider calls include the prompt builder output before the bounded transcript

requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC builds partial compaction prompts for both recent-message summaries and prefix summaries that will be followed by preserved newer messages.
edgeCases: direction from uses the recent-message summary structure
direction up_to uses the context-for-continuing-work structure
custom instructions are preserved for partial compaction

requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC strips the drafting analysis block and converts a summary XML block into readable continuation text.
edgeCases: summaries without XML summary tags are returned as stripped plain text
summary XML tags become a Summary section header

requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC formats compacted summaries as continuation messages with optional transcript and preserved-recent-message context.
edgeCases: transcript path guidance is included when supplied
recent preserved messages are called out when supplied

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The PR-07 goal gate verifies the compact prompt APIs instead of an unrelated prompt assembly branch.
edgeCases: the PR-07 compact targeted Vitest suite must pass
compact prompt tests must cover partial prompt behavior

intentionalReductions: The source snapshot's proactive continuation branch is behind feature flags and depends on a proactive subsystem that is not live in the gut runtime, so PR-07 keeps the normal continuation wording only.
The target prompt text uses ASCII punctuation to match this repository's file editing discipline while preserving the same runtime instructions.
outOfScope: Wiring these prompt builders into provider-specific prompt-cache behavior is outside PR-07.
Changing session-memory compaction policy is outside PR-07.
